## AC Evidence

每个 `REQUIREMENT.md` 中的 AC 必须有证据行。AC 编号必须保持 `AC-01` 格式。

| AC | Requirement Summary | Evidence Type | Evidence Location | Result | Residual Risk |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| AC-01 | | test / command / code / manual / skipped | | pass / fail / conditional / skipped | |
